title: arundinella glauca
intro: Arundinella glauca is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, commonly found in India, China, and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arundinella glauca include treating fever, cold, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include making teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
